Research Funding

Our work is made possible through the generous support of the following organizations:

National Science Foundation (NSF)

CAREER: CO2-Efficient Computing: Quantifying Trade-Offs in Power, Performance, Area, and Total Carbon Footprint of Monolithic Three-Dimensional Integrated Circuits

Computing’s carbon footprint is growing at an unsustainable rate. To overcome this global challenge, researchers and professionals are exploring techniques to reduce the total carbon...
